name: Bean Curd & Coconut Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Chili, seeded - sliced into thin rounds
2 tbsp Fresh basil and/or mint - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop lemongrass and bruise it with the flat of a cleaver.
2. Add Laos powder and lemongrass to coconut milk, and slowly bring to a boil while stirring gently. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Strain off lemongrass.
4. Add tofu, stirring into stock.
5. Remove 2 cups of stock. Dissolve miso in it, and return to pot. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Add tofu, stirring into stock.
7. Remove 2 cups of stock. Dissolve miso in it, and return to pot. Simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Add remaining ingredients, and serve garnished with coriander. This is delicious with a bowl of Thai jasmine rice.
